title: Slovakian Crisp Apple Strudel
description: A classic Slovakian dessert, this strudel combines the warmth of apples with the crunch of a flaky crust.
instructions: On a lightly floured surface, roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large bowl, mix together the apple filling, sugars, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
Spread the apple mixture evenly over the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges of the dough with the melted butter.
Roll the dough into a tight log, starting from one of the long edges.
Place the log seam-side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the strudel is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Slice the strudel into 8-10 pieces and serve warm.
